member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Api.RadioOnlineController
member.summary: API controller for the Radio Online plugin. Provides endpoints for managing the radio streaming configuration, schedule entries, and runtime status.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Api.RadioOnlineController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService,Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Api.RadioOnlineController.GetStatus
member.summary: Gets the current streaming status.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Api.RadioOnlineController.GetPlaylists
member.summary: Gets all available playlists from Jellyfin.
member.returns: A list of playlist IDs and names.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Api.RadioOnlineController.ValidateSchedule(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry)
member.summary: Validates a schedule entry.
member.returns: A list of validation errors (empty if valid).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration model for the Radio Online plugin. Contains Icecast server settings and weekly schedule programming.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IcecastUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Icecast server URL (e.g., http://your-server:8000).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IcecastUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the Icecast source username (typically "source").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IcecastPassword
member.summary: Gets or sets the Icecast source password.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IcecastMountPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the Icecast mount point (e.g., /radio or /stream). Must start with a forward slash.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AudioFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio format to send to Icecast. Supported values: "m4a" (AAC in MPEG-4 container) or "ogg" (Ogg Vorbis/Opus).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AudioBitrate
member.summary: Gets or sets the audio bitrate in kbps.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StreamName
member.summary: Gets or sets the stream name metadata sent to Icecast listeners.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StreamDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the stream description metadata sent to Icecast listeners.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StreamGenre
member.summary: Gets or sets the stream genre metadata sent to Icecast listeners.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StreamPublic
member.summary: Gets or sets the public flag for the Icecast stream (true = listed in directory).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the radio automation is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ScheduleEntries
member.summary: Gets or sets the weekly schedule entries. Each entry maps a specific day and time slot to a playlist.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.JellyfinUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID used for library access. This user must have access to all relevant media libraries.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.RandomFillLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of random songs to queue when filling unscheduled time slots or when a playlist ends before the time slot.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry
member.summary: Represents a single schedule entry in the weekly radio programming. Maps a specific day-of-week and time slot to a Jellyfin playlist.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.DayOfWeek
member.summary: Gets or sets the day of the week (Monday through Friday).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.StartTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the start time of the schedule slot in "HH:mm" format (24-hour).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.EndTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the end time of the schedule slot in "HH:mm" format (24-hour).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.PlaylistId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin playlist ID to play during this slot. If empty or null, random music from the library will be used instead.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets a friendly display name for this schedule entry.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this schedule entry is active.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.GetStartTimeSpan
member.summary: Parses the StartTime string into a TimeSpan.
member.returns: The parsed TimeSpan, or TimeSpan.Zero if parsing fails.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry.GetEndTimeSpan
member.summary: Parses the EndTime string into a TimeSpan.
member.returns: The parsed TimeSpan, or TimeSpan.FromHours(23.9833) if parsing fails.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Plugin
member.summary: Main entry point for the Jellyfin Radio Online plugin. Provides automated online radio streaming to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling capabilities.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Plugin.PluginGuid
member.summary: The unique identifier for this plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the plugin for access by services.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Plugin.GetPages
member.summary: Gets the plugin web pages (configuration dashboard).
member.returns: An enumerable of plugin page info objects.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.ScheduledTasks.RadioSchedulerTask
member.summary: Scheduled task for the Radio Online plugin. Provides dashboard visibility and manual trigger capability for the radio streaming service. This task primarily serves as a health check and status reporter for the radio automation.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.ScheduledTasks.RadioSchedulerTask.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.ScheduledTasks.RadioSchedulerTask},MediaBrowser.Model.Globalization.ILocalizationManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.ServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers services for the Radio Online plugin with Jellyfin's DI container. This class is automatically discovered by Jellyfin via reflection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.ServiceRegistrator.RegisterServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,MediaBrowser.Controller.IServerApplicationHost)
member.summary: Registers all plugin services, scheduled tasks, and hosted services.
member.param: The service collection to register services with.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService
member.summary: Provides audio items from Jellyfin's library and playlists. Handles retrieving playlist items, random music selection, and item metadata.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.GetPlaylistItems(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all audio items from a specific playlist.
member.param: The user ID for access validation.
member.returns: An ordered list of audio items from the playlist, or an empty list if not found.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.GetRandomMusic(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a shuffled list of random audio items from the entire Jellyfin library.
member.param: The user ID for library access.
Maximum number of items to return.
member.returns: A shuffled list of random audio items.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.GetAvailablePlaylists(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all available playlists in Jellyfin for a user.
member.param: The user ID for access validation.
member.returns: A list of playlist info tuples (id, name).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.CalculateTotalDuration(System.Collections.Generic.List{MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.Audio.Audio})
member.summary: Calculates the total duration of a list of audio items.
member.param: The audio items to calculate duration for.
member.returns: The total duration as a TimeSpan.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.ShuffleItems(System.Collections.Generic.List{MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.Audio.Audio})
member.summary: Shuffles a list of audio items using Fisher-Yates algorithm.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.GetAudioFilePath(MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.Audio.Audio)
member.summary: Gets the filesystem path for an audio item.
member.returns: The filesystem path, or null if unavailable.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.AudioProviderService.TryGetUser(System.String,System.Guid@)
member.summary: Validates that a user exists by their ID string.
member.param: The parsed user GUID if valid.
member.returns: True if the user exists, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService
member.summary: Handles the actual streaming of audio data to an Icecast server. Uses FFmpeg to encode audio and sends it via HTTP PUT to the Icecast mount point.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService},MediaBrowser.Controller.MediaEncoding.IMediaEncoder)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.IsStreaming
member.summary: Gets whether the service is currently streaming audio.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.StreamFileAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts streaming a single audio file to the configured Icecast server.
member.param: The absolute path to the audio file to stream.
The target audio bitrate in kbps.
member.returns: A task representing the async operation. Returns true if completed normally.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.BuildIcecastSourceUrl(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the Icecast source URL from server URL and mount point.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.BuildFFmpegArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the FFmpeg process start info with the correct encoding arguments.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.EscapeMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes metadata string values for FFmpeg.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.StopStreaming
member.summary: Stops the current streaming session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.StopStreamingInternal
member.summary: Internal method to stop streaming (caller must hold _lock).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.CleanupProcess
member.summary: Cleans up the FFmpeg process resources.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.IcecastStreamingService.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes of the streaming service resources.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService
member.summary: Background hosted service that manages the continuous radio streaming loop. This service runs continuously while the plugin is enabled, managing the schedule-aware playback cycle: checking the schedule, selecting playlists or random music, streaming to Icecast, and handling transitions between slots.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the main radio streaming loop. Continuously checks the schedule and streams appropriate audio to Icecast.
member.param: The cancellation token for service shutdown.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService.RunStreamingCycle(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a single streaming cycle: determines what to play and streams it.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService.TrimAudioToDuration(System.Collections.Generic.List{MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.Audio.Audio},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Trims a list of audio items to fit within a maximum duration. Items are included sequentially until the time limit would be exceeded.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService.ValidateConfig(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Validates that the plugin configuration is complete and correct.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.RadioStreamingHostedService.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops the streaming service gracefully.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService
member.summary: Manages the weekly radio schedule by determining which playlist should play at any given time based on the configured schedule entries. Handles time slot matching, playlist duration management, and fallback logic.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.GetActiveScheduleEntry(System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Gets the active schedule entry for the current time (or a specific time). If no schedule entry matches, returns null (indicating random fill mode).
member.param: The date/time to check. Defaults to now.
member.returns: The matching schedule entry, or null if unscheduled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.GetRemainingTimeInSlot(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry)
member.summary: Calculates the remaining time in the current schedule slot.
member.returns: The remaining duration in the current time slot.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.GetTimeUntilNextScheduleEntry(System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry})
member.summary: Calculates the time until the next schedule entry begins. Useful for determining how long to play random music before a scheduled slot.
member.returns: The time until the next scheduled entry, or null if none exists today.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.GetNextScheduleChange(System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry})
member.summary: Gets the next schedule change information (when current state ends).
member.returns: A tuple with the next change time and whether it's a scheduled playlist.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Services.ScheduleManagerService.ValidateScheduleEntry(Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry,System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin.Plugin.RadioOnline.Configuration.ScheduleEntry})
member.summary: Validates a schedule entry for correctness. Checks that times are valid and do not conflict with existing entries.
member.param: All existing schedule entries for conflict checking.
member.returns: A list of validation error messages. Empty if valid.
